compounds.frequency: once daily for first week, then twice daily

benefits.description: Brain fog resolved approximately 6 hours after first dose
Chronic fatigue resolved approximately 6 hours after first dose
Sleep quality dramatically improved; went from waking 4-5 times per night to once; deeper sleep
Felt calm and alert after first dose; overall mental state greatly improved
Pain from rotator cuff, AC joint, and hip labrum improved; flare-up recovery time reduced from 2-3 weeks to 1-2 days
IBS symptoms targeted as primary reason for use

protocol_notes: Oral BPC taken fasted with no food for 1 hour after dosing for max absorption. Injectable BPC arrived 3 weeks after starting oral; dose titrated from 200mcg up to 450mcg. OP argues injecting near site of injury is bro science and that systemic absorption is the mechanism. Plans to extend cycle beyond 12 weeks.
